debug_info.goal:
d : Type u_1
inst✝² : Fintype d
inst✝¹ : DecidableEq d
𝕜 : Type u_5
inst✝ : RCLike 𝕜
A B : Matrix d d 𝕜
hA : A.IsHermitian
hB : B.IsHermitian
hAB : Commute A B
j : d
⊢ A.mulVec ((@Matrix.sharedEigenbasis d inst✝² inst✝¹ 𝕜 inst✝ A B hA hB hAB) j) =
    @Matrix.SharedEigenbasis.sharedEigenvalueA d inst✝² inst✝¹ 𝕜 inst✝ A B hA hB hAB j •
      WithLp.ofLp ((@Matrix.sharedEigenbasis d inst✝² inst✝¹ 𝕜 inst✝ A B hA hB hAB) j)

failed_attempts:
apply WithLp.equiv.symm.injective
  rw [← Matrix.ofLp_toEuclideanLin_apply]
  dsimp only [sharedEigenvalueA]
  rw [Matrix.sharedEigenbasis, LinearMap.sharedEigenbasis, OrthonormalBasis.reindex_apply]
  set k := (Fintype.equivOfCardEq _ j)
  obtain ⟨⟨μA, μB⟩, i⟩ := k
  have h_mem := DirectSum.IsInternal.subordinateOrthonormalBasis_apply_mem
    (LinearMap.IsSymmetric.directSum_isInternal_of_commute' (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA)
      (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hB) (commute_euclideanLin hAB))
    (LinearMap.IsSymmetric.orthogonalFamily_eigenspace_inf_eigenspace' (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA)
      (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hB))
    (by rfl) k
  simp only [Submodule.mem_inf, mem_eigenspace_iff] at h_mem
  rw [h_mem.1]
  have h_real : RCLike.re (μA : 𝕜) = μA := by
    rw [← RCLike.isReal_iff_re_eq_self]
    exact LinearMap.IsSymmetric.isReal_of_eigenvalue (isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA) μA.2
  simp [dotProduct_smul_right, h_real]
